title: Data-broker opt-out (available in every state)
summary: Most people-search and data-broker sites let anyone request removal of their listing, regardless of where you live — this is the broker's own policy, not a statutory right. It's the baseline path Errata prepares for you above, and it works even in states that grant no deletion right.
disclaimer: General information, not legal advice. A voluntary opt-out is honored at the broker's discretion and a listing can reappear later — re-check periodically.
